research de capitalé — est. 2026

Depth of analysis,
not depth of noise.

Research de Capitalé is an independent research house producing investment and corporate finance analysis for investors, venture capital firms, and hedge funds — built on rigor rather than volume, and reach rather than borders.

view coverage view research
focusfinance

primary marketsus / uk / fr
clientsinvestors · vc · hedge funds

Research built to be relied on, not just read.

01 / about

"We would rather publish less, and be right for longer."

Research de Capitalé was founded on a simple premise: most research is written to be read quickly, and ours is written to be trusted slowly. As a newly established firm, we are not asking clients to take our tenure on faith — we're asking them to judge the work itself.

Every note we publish is built from primary analysis first, consensus second. We hold our own findings to the standard we would want applied to a decision involving our own capital — because that is, ultimately, the standard our clients are applying to theirs.

01

Primary analysis

Original modeling and source work before any conclusion is drafted.

02

Independence

No underwriting relationships or trading desk to answer to.

03

Global lens

Coverage spanning major capital markets, not a single region.

04

Direct access

A small firm means direct contact with the people who wrote the work.

Coverage across finance, wherever capital moves.
